name: 0trace
title: 0trace
summary: traceroute tool that can run within an existing TCP connection
description:
traceroute tool that can run within an existing TCP connection
The package is traceroute tool that can be run within an existing, open TCP
connection, therefore bypassing some types of stateful packet filters with
ease.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use 0trace.sh because traceroute tool that can run within an existing TCP connection.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use 0trace.sh as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `0trace.sh [options] [args]` as documented upstream for 0trace.sh.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair 0trace.sh with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `0trace.sh --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
